meaning: n.高声笑,博取笑声的台词,卖座的戏
examples: Its leading exponents include Gutierrez, Leonardo Boff of Brazil, and Juan Luis Segundo of Uruguay.
The new trainer is Marc Boff, who spent the last four seasons as the Chicago Bulls' assistant trainer.
Before working with the Bulls, Boff was the strength coach and physical therapist for the New Orleans Hornets for two seasons.
Further attempts to restrain Fr Boff led to him leaving the priesthood in 1992.
Driving marketing innovation is CMO Beth Comstock and Global Executive Director of Digital, Advertising and Design Linda Boff.
